articles.title: Trump touts mysterious 'Freedom Fuel' network of cheap gas stations as pump prices rise - Yahoo Finance
articles.description: President Trump has been touting a murky new venture to buttress his claims that Americans are seeing gas price relief. But the president has a larger proble...
articles.content:
President Trump has been touting a murky new venture called the "Freedom Fuel Network" to buttress his claims that Americans are seeing relief at the pump.
But new questions about the cheap gas vent… [+4266 chars]
